name: linSetBusIdleTimeout
title: linSetBusIdleTimeout
description: This function sets a new bus idle timeout. Depending on the protocol version, the timeout will be specified in bit times (LIN 1.x and Cooling) or in milliseconds (all others).

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: The timeout in bit times (LIN 1.x and Cooling) or milliseconds (all other LIN protocols).

return: On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.
